title: Add justfile with render-docs recipe and common repo commands

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Creating a justfile at repo root with: (1) render-docs — copies SVG assets, runs quarto render, verifies output; (2) other common recipes for build, test, lint. The render-docs recipe will be usable in CI (docs.yml) to replace the bare quarto render call, ensuring assets are always copied correctly.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Created justfile with recipes: render-docs (asset copy + quarto + verify), build, build-release, lint/fmt/clippy, test/test-unit/test-integration/test-proptest, audit, ci. Updated docs.yml workflow to use 'just render-docs' with extractions/setup-just@v2. Also added justfile to docs workflow path triggers.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Added all 8 Python SVG render scripts to the render-docs pipeline: generate-banner, generate-card-icons, and 6 diagram generators. They run before quarto render so source SVGs are always fresh. Verify step now also checks all diagram SVGs exist.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Changing render flow: quarto renders to a temp dir, then we diff against docs/ to catch collisions with manually-maintained .md files (api.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, ELI5.md), warn on collisions, and copy with --force flag to override. This protects the GH-browsable docs that coexist in docs/.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Render flow now: (1) generate SVGs into docs_src/, (2) quarto renders to .docs_build/ temp dir via QUARTO_PROJECT_OUTPUT_DIR override, (3) collision check scans temp output against docs/ for files with no docs_src/ source (protects api.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, ELI5.md), (4) rsync with --filter='protect *.md' copies to docs/ preserving manual files, (5) --force flag overrides collisions, (6) verify step gates output. Added .docs_build/ to .gitignore and scripts/** to docs.yml triggers.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Committed: fix(docs): add justfile with render-docs pipeline and fix missing SVG assets [CL-192] [CL-193] | Files: 70 files changed, 30617 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
